sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99987" key="sunekrofe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεκ-ροφέω</orth>, <sense id="n99987.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gulp down together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:20:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
